examples: He projected his feelings

meanings.definition: extend out or project in space
examples: His sharp nose jutted out
A single rock sticks out from the cliff

meanings.definition: transfer (ideas or principles) from one domain into another

examples: The images are projected onto the screen
His voice projects well

meanings.definition: make or work out a plan for; devise
examples: They contrived to murder their boss
design a new sales strategy
plan an attack

meanings.definition: present for consideration, examination, criticism, etc.
examples: He proposed a new plan for dealing with terrorism
She proposed a new theory of relativity

meanings.definition: imagine; conceive of; see in one's mind
examples: I can't see him on horseback!
I can see what will happen
I can see a risk in this strategy
She threw the flashlight beam into the corner
The setting sun threw long shadows
cast a spell
cast a warm light
project a missile

meanings.definition: extending out above or beyond a surface or boundary
examples: the jutting limb of a tree
massive projected buttresses
his protruding ribs
a pile of boards sticking over the end of his truck
